description:
Legal document in Arabic script. Mentions the date Dhū l-Qaʿda 606 AH = April/May 1210 CE. Also mentions a period of two years and very large sums of money (over 800 dinars). Needs examination. 

On verso a calendar in Hebrew script.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
